video_info.title: UFC Fight Night - Muhammad vs Bonfim
video_info.shortDescription: UFC Fight Night - Muhammad vs. Bonfim unfolds at the Apex in Las Vegas with a high-stakes welterweight main event that pits experience against momentum as former champion Belal Muhammad looks to halt his recent slide against surging Brazilian contender Gabriel Bonfim. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.
